content.content: Revered psychotherapist, orator, and consultant who has been hailed as one of the greatest love and seduction specialists in the world. He has been featured by news and media outlets such as Correio Braziliense Newspaper,  Manhã Maior, Hoje em Dia, Radio Transamerica, and Playboy Magazine, among countless others. He has also created online courses on topics like the secrets of attraction and seduction phrases. His self-titled YouTube channel has attracted a massive following of more than 1.6 million subscribers from all around the world. He earned a bachelor's degree in psychology before going on to also earn a master's degree in psychoanalysis. His master's degree came with a specialty in clinical and therapeutic hypnosis. He worked as a civil servant before devoting himself to psychotherapy and content creation fulltime. He has authored a wide selection of e-books on love and relationships. Some of his popular titles include Master the Language of Love, End Emotional Dependence, Make Someone Desire You, Learn to Be Missed and Win Back, and What to Do if Someone Has Blocked You. He is originally from Brazil. He worked as a consultant with television presenters likeAna Maria Bragaon the Rede Globo program Mais Você, as well asRonnie Vonon TV Gazeta's Programa Todo Seu.
